word: H2714 - חֵקֶר - chêqer - khay'-ker - Finding out

sections.paragraph:
Original: חקר

Transliteration: chêqer

Phonetic: khay'-ker

BDB Definition:

  1. a search, investigation, searching, enquiry, thing to be searched out

Origin: from H2713

TWOT entry: 729a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
